vlm_note: The empty_baseline overlay was ~25px vertically off for this frame, so I re-fit directly from post_setup (read_board_stable) and read every piece against post_setup coordinates. Colour note: meta.player_colors labels DaanDaanDaan 'RED', but their pieces render BLUE on screen; with only two players and ThePhantom clearly BLACK, the blue pieces are unambiguously DaanDaanDaan's. ThePhantom (BLACK) settlements v6 (WOO5/ORE6/ORE9) and v23 (WHE4/SHE3/WHE8), roads v6-v2 and v23-v22. DaanDaanDaan (BLUE) settlements v1 (BRI11/ORE6/WOO3) and v19 (WHE9/WHE4/SHE3), roads v1-v10 (up-right) and v19-v20. GRANT SELF-CHECK PASSES: ThePhantom grant {SHEEP:1, WHEAT:2} equals EXACTLY v23's hexes and NOT v6's ({WOOD,ORE,ORE}); DaanDaanDaan grant {BRICK:1, ORE:1, WOOD:1} equals EXACTLY v1's hexes and NOT v19's ({WHEAT,WHEAT,SHEEP}). Each grant matches exactly one settlement; all four roads resolve to real edges.
